description1: As a passionate FullStack Developer, my experience spans API creation and development, with a special love for prototyping projects. I get involved in every detail, using methods like sprint design for quick and effective conceptualization. Capable of handling complete project development, I have experience working in teams and making crucial decisions in diverse environments. My approach is based on agile practices and good techniques like TDD, GIT, and methodologies like Kanban and Scrum, always with an eye on scalability and efficiency.
techSub: Additionally I have worked and developed with other technologies:
techSub2: You can see all the technologies I have worked with at:
job1desc: At Sirastudio, I dedicated myself to developing custom websites in WordPress and PrestaShop, creating specific plugins and themes. I also configured optimized servers for WordPress and developed PHP scripts, offering comprehensive web solutions to clients.
job2desc: I founded Hard Monkey PC, a programming agency focused on helping SMEs develop their internet presence. My services included web design and development, digital marketing, as well as creating custom WordPress websites and custom plugins. I was also in charge of creating and selling dedicated servers in collaboration with LiquidNet Ltd., and developing websites using PHP with frameworks like Laravel and CodeIgniter, in addition to JavaScript with technologies like React and NodeJS
job3desc: At Ibermática, I developed a 3D virtual sports board for 1d3a S.L using ThreeJS, WebGL and NodeJS. My work received a positive response from the client, which led to them hiring me directly to continue development and expansion of the project, addressing more complex aspects and other related applications
job4desc1: At 1d3a SL, I worked on API and application integration in JS, NodeJS and PHP. I developed a 3D virtual board for sports strategies, used by teams like FC Barcelona. I also created a video editing tool for coaches and assisted in integrating this technology into apps for sports team management.
job5desc: FullStack Developer, NodeJS and React Consultant
job5desc1: At AXA, I led the implementation, development and scalability of an application and dashboard for chatbot management, widely used in Asia and Europe. I used NLP.js, a Microsoft open source AI tool, to develop a daily backup system for chatbots and an innovative chart in the dashboard to intuitively visualize user trajectories and detect problems in real time. This dashboard was used globally in various scenarios, including automated calls and chats on multiple platforms like mobile and social media.
job6desc1: At MVST, I developed a website for an investment bank in Berlin, using NextJS, React, Node on the frontend, and Ruby along with Strapi on the backend. I implemented an evaluation tool to rate and contact the company, based on their data. Additionally, the project used GraphQL to handle translations and page content. Although the concept was basic, I contributed key functionality to the website
job7desc1: At Embat Technologies, I dedicated myself to creating new functionalities and modules for the Embat application, highlighting a treasury management module for corporate holdings and scenario projection. I worked on development with React, including creating a Storybook, and used Recharts to design responsive and optimized charts of various types. I developed modular tables for treasury data visualization and varied charts, ensuring efficient performance through VirtualDOM. Additionally, I was in charge of backend development using Google Cloud Cloud Functions, improving overall functionality and scalability.
job8desc1: At Union Avatars, as a FullStack Developer, I worked on frontend development with React and backend with Python for a 3D avatar model converter. I implemented a 3D viewer on the frontend to preview and select avatar animations, also used to display NFTs on OpenSea. I contributed to analytics systems integration with Datadog RUM and Google Analytics. I participated in optimization and bug fixing of an avatar and outfit selector developed in Vue, and assisted in its transition to React, implementing improvements like zustand, SSR and developing a Storybook UI.
job9desc1: I developed key functionalities for the backoffice of a metrics platform, using Strapi and Azure Functions on the backend and React on the frontend. I implemented PDF report modules and dashboards with Highcharts, in addition to integrating Microsoft Graph API for user monitoring.
job10desc1: At Betterfly, I was responsible for developing the Flexible Compensation module, a key benefit within the Betterfly app that allows companies to offer personalized advantages to their employees. I started by improving and maintaining the legacy platform, optimizing existing functionalities and resolving technical debt. Subsequently, I led the backend development of the new app, designing and implementing scalable APIs and integrating the module into the modern architecture. My contributions enabled a smooth transition from the legacy system to the new platform, improving performance, security and user experience for both administrators and end users.
footercvmsg: Personal projects on my Github "polopopeye" or on my blog, kennethsuarez.es
education1: Technician in microcomputer systems and local networks
education2: I started an MSC in Cybersecurity in Estonia, but decided to focus more on web development which is what I like most
